AMS DERIVE

AMS DERIVE

Quantitative Trading & Mathematical Competition

REGISTRATIONS OPEN IN

35:02:29:36
DAYSHOURSMINUTESSECONDS

About AMS Derive

Quantitative Trading

Experience the fast-paced world of high-frequency trading and derivatives. Develop strategies that survive market volatility.

Mathematics

Apply advanced mathematical modeling to solve complex financial problems. From stochastic calculus to linear algebra.

Algorithmic Thinking

Optimize your code for speed and efficiency. Every microsecond counts when competing in a simulated market environment.

Competition Format

01
Mathematical Modeling

A rigorous round focused on derivatives pricing, risk management, and statistical arbitrage theory.

02
Algorithmic Trading

Implement and backtest high-frequency strategies on historical market data using our proprietary engine.

03
Market Simulation

The final round where your algorithms compete in real-time against other participants in a live simulated exchange.

Timeline

APRIL 20, 2026
Registrations Open
Participant registrations begin.
MAY 23, 2026
Round 1: PRIOR
Online qualification round focused on derivatives and math.
JUNE 21, 2026
Round 2: POSTERIOR
Advanced round for top performers.
JULY 11, 2026
Finals: CONVERGENCE
Onsite coding round for the top competitors.

Who Should Participate

Competitive Programmers

Top-tier coders who thrive under pressure and enjoy solving algorithmic puzzles.

Mathematics Students

Analytical minds with a strong foundation in probability, statistics, and calculus.

Quant Enthusiasts

Aspiring quantitative researchers and traders interested in financial markets.

Finance Engineers

Engineers who want to build the next generation of financial technology and systems.

AMS

Exploring the space where deep algorithmic thinking meets quantitative finance.
